title: PP SMP
description: Official modpack for PP SMP, a private vanilla 1.21.4 server consisting of 2 main teams competing against each other. Contains shaders, optimizations, and quality of life mods.
body:
# PP SMP Modpack

This is the official modpack for PP SMP, a private vanilla 1.21.4 server consisting of 2 main teams competing against each other.

This modpack contains shaders, optimizations, and quality of life mods.

<details>
<summary>Full list of mods</summary>

- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
- BadOptimizations
- Better Mount HUD
- Capes
- Chat Heads
- Cloth Config API
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- Continuity
- Cubes Without Borders
- Debugify
- e4mc
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Culling
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FastQuit
- FerriteCore
- Forge Config API Port
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris Shaders
- Jade
- LambDynamicLights
- Mod Menu
- Model Gap Fix
- ModernFix
- More Chat History
- No Chat Reports
- OptiGUI
- Paginated Advancements & Custom Frames
- Polytone
- Puzzle
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Remove Reloading Screen
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Text Placeholder API
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- Your Options Shall Be Respected
</details>

The included resource pack is from [vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net/).
